calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: John Zanghi, Esq., appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Conard House, Inc.
Respondent/Plaintiff Kyle Kohleffer appeared in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Parties stipulated to a Judge Pro Tem.
Respondent/Plaintiff Kyle Kohleffer testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent's Exhibit 1 - Group of documents relating to Mr. Kohleffer's medical records
Respondent's Exhibit 2 - Group of emails regarding Mr. Kohleffer's expectations re: Conard House
Respondent's Exhibit 3 - Documents relating to building maintenance, tenant witness letter
Respondent's Exhibit 4 - Resident Complaint/Comment Cards

John Zanghi, Esq., testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Conard House. Witnesses for Appellant/Defendant Ken Bounthauy, Johnson Ragudos, and Dave Hasbrouck testify. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Appellant's Exhibit A - Document regarding radiator
Appellant's Exhibit B - Group of invoices for repair of elevator
Appellant's Exhibit C - Boiler certificates
Appellant's Exhibit D - General ledger
Appellant's Exhibit E - Letter regarding building audit
Appellant's Exhibit F - Tenant Lease Agreement

After hearing and considering the testimony and evidence presented, the Court takes the matter under submission.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits retained by the court.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Judgment Entered
